steps.title: Identify the angle relationship
steps.content: Lines $r$ and $s$ are parallel, and line $n$ is a transversal. The $164^\circ$ angle and the $x^\circ$ angle are in matching positions at the two intersections, so they are corresponding angles.

steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Corresponding angles formed by a transversal crossing parallel lines are congruent. Therefore, $x = 164$, so the answer is 164.
